title: Bound blast radius with resource-group and lock design
description: Organize resources into lifecycle-aligned resource groups and apply CanNotDelete locks so a deletion or RBAC change cannot cascade.
body: Use when structuring an Azure subscription or protecting critical resources. Do not lump unrelated lifecycles into one resource group or leave stateful resources unlocked. Actions: group resources that share a lifecycle and region into the same resource group, place shared/stateful resources (databases, storage) in their own group, apply a CanNotDelete or ReadOnly management lock on critical resources, and tag for ownership and cost. Validation signals include a delete attempt on a locked resource being refused and RBAC/cost scoping cleanly to the group. Risk boundary: removing a lock or deleting a resource group is human-gated since it can cascade across many resources.
